settings.heading: Swiss innovation for prevention-first home security.
settings.lede: Mitipi AG develops Kevin®, a presence simulation device that helps homes, flats, offices, and holiday properties look occupied when people are away—without cameras or microphones.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® presence simulation — editorial product visual
settings.cta_heading: Join the movement for safer homes.

settings.heading: Everyone deserves to feel safe.
settings.body: Burglars choose easy targets—dark windows, silent halls, predictable timers. Kevin adds believable light, shadow, and sound so your home reads as lived-in from the street.

settings.title: Prevention, not surveillance
settings.body: We believe deterrence should not require cameras or microphones. Kevin stores simulations locally on the device, uses typical power around 9 watts, and complements alarms and cameras rather than replacing them.

settings.heading: From Zurich idea to global protection.
settings.body: Kevin was conceived in Zurich. Mitipi was founded in 2018 and has since launched Kevin across Switzerland, Europe, and the United States.

settings.title: Kevin idea born in Zurich
settings.body: Development begins on a device that simulates human presence through light, shadow, and sound.

settings.title: Launch in Switzerland
settings.body: Kevin launches in Switzerland. Mitipi wins the Global Digital Insurance Agenda Award (DIA) in Amsterdam.

settings.title: Kevin.2 and Bluefactory
settings.body: Kevin.2 adds own recording and geo-fencing. Mitipi moves to Bluefactory in Fribourg and wins the Plus X Award in Germany.

settings.title: Kevin.3 launch
settings.body: Kevin.3 launches with upgraded hardware, personalizable features, and extended simulation. European and US patents granted.

settings.title: European Security Award
settings.body: Mitipi wins the European Security Award for the most innovative burglary protection in Europe.

settings.title: Award-winning innovation
settings.body: Kevin is an award-winning anti-intrusion device, engineered in Switzerland, with worldwide patents on technology to simulate the presence of people.

settings.title: Mitipi AG
settings.body: Mitipi AG · Passage du Cardinal 11 · Bluefactory · CH-1700 Fribourg · Switzerland · CHE-356.372.981. Kevin® is developed by Mitipi and sold in Europe through mitipi.eu.
